require_network_gate: gate an outbound network call by calling require_network with a label and url before making the request
is_local_url_check: check if a URL targets localhost, a LAN host, or a private IP range using is_local_url
offline_strict_toggle: check whether CODER_OFFLINE_STRICT is enabled by calling offline_strict to toggle strict mode at runtime
OfflineBlockedError_handle: handle OfflineBlockedError exceptions raised when strict offline mode refuses an external network request
review_offline_helpers: review the offline module to understand how require_network gates external calls when CODER_OFFLINE_STRICT is set
